name: Christiana Lin
background: Ms. Lin has served as our General Counsel and Corporate Secretary since September 2021. Previously, Ms. Lin served as General Counsel of Legacy BlackSky from 2018 to September 2021. Prior to joining Legacy BlackSky, Ms. Lin served as General Counsel and Chief Privacy Officer of Rubicon Project, Inc. and held various roles at AOL Inc.

company_affiliations.name: comScore, Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Executive Vice President, General Counsel, Chief Privacy Officer, and Corporate Secretary
